item.title: Version 1.7.0
item.description:
AutoSetup

  • AutoSetup now presents as a native macOS sheet, matching the Settings overlay — drag it freely, detached from the main window.
  • Overlay auto-sizes responsively; no longer clips in narrow window configurations.
  • Assign button updated to a + (plus.circle) icon for clarity.
  • Overlay drag and positioning behaviour unified with the Settings sheet.

Macros

  • Macro slot recall now correctly applies all parameter updates through the canonical pipeline on every click — no more silent misfires.
  • Lock Slots Control Mode is now scoped per macro identity instead of globally, preventing cross-macro interference.
  • Macro activity LED now fires during slider drag, not on release.
  • Macro persistence decoupled from theme saves — macros survive theme switches without writing to the theme file.
  • Macro persistence reliability and startup restore hardened.
  • Orphaned macro routes (from deleted groups or operators) cleaned up automatically on load.

Editor

  • Track palette traversal, group removal, and parameter selection logic corrected.
  • Recursive parameter group movement enabled; Remove from Group context menu item added to reassign parameters back to the All Parameters pool.
  • Drag-to-reorder colour operators in the Editor parameter list.
  • Shift-select and right-click selection in the Editor parameter list fixed.
  • Dragged operator row selection background cleared for legibility.
  • Group search: pressing Enter now confirms and navigates instead of toggling expand.

CFG & Grade

  • CFG clip sort order layout fixed; header arrow keys now theme-driven.
  • GLOBAL directive radio dot uses correct orange accent; label stays teal.
  • CFG header button XML keys unified into Button* naming.
  • Grade EDIT button active state (gold border, warm light icon) now reads correctly from XML.
  • Grading theme ownership correctly falls back to DMTheme-first.

Theme Library

  • 1px separator added above the versions header for visual clarity.
  • Factory Default theme no longer cross-contaminates edit history.
  • Factory themes protected from save-back corruption.

Bug Fixes

  • Support email address updated.
  • Missing XML colour keys AutoSetupHeaderAction* and MacroSlotListAccentText restored.
  • Disabled button text opacity raised for legibility.

New XML Theme Keys

  • MacroSlotListAccentText, AutoSetupHeaderAction*, MacroASHeaderButton*, CfgHeaderButton*, CfgMenuActiveText, TracksTTMCfgRadioActive.

item.title: Version 1.7.0
item.description:
Colour Grading

  • New SuppressorBand hue-anchor system in the Colour Grading view — pin a hue range to suppress competing bands during grading.
  • Master Grade indicator disabled to reduce visual noise during grading sessions.
  • Meter parameters now ordered vertically for a cleaner layout.

Macros

  • Macro grade routing updated for more accurate parameter mapping.
  • Macro remap slider track now redraws correctly during a drag.
  • Macro remap handle compression fixed — handles no longer overlap at narrow widths.
  • Macro delete confirmation now aborts cleanly on an outside click instead of locking the row.
  • Blend value edits are now logged in undo history.

Tracks Tab

  • Tracks Max for Live device now correctly bundled with the app.
  • Reverse sensitivity filtering in the Tracks tab fixed.
  • Tracks TTM toolbar and SETTINGS overlay colour keys externalised — fully themeable.
  • Tracks sidebar styling unified with the Library and Matrix tab designs.
  • Filter button frame colour updated.

Editor & HUD

  • Colour Operator context menu reordered: Hue, Saturation, Brightness, Contrast, Exposure, Gamma, Grade.
  • HUD now defaults to showing the selected parameter on open.
  • Colour slider value field height and corner radius reduced for a tighter layout.
  • History shortcut remapped to avoid conflict.

Settings & UI

  • Settings title bar chevron border added.
  • Sheet zoom layout sizing and scaling corrected.
  • TweakMode pane anchor math fixed — panel no longer drifts off-screen on resize.
  • Content update timestamp label clarified.

Stability & Startup

  • Startup theme restore readiness hardened — theme is guaranteed loaded before any UI reads it.
  • Sparkle automatic relaunch after update fixed.
  • Ableton Live is now revealed in the Dock during a font-change restart sequence.

New XML Theme Keys

  • TracksTTMToolbar*, TracksTTMSidebar*, SettingsOverlay* — externalised colour keys for TweakMode toolbar, sidebar, and Settings overlay controls.

item.title: Version 1.6.5
item.description:
AutoSetup

  • AutoSetup now presents as a native macOS sheet, matching the Settings overlay — drag it freely, detached from the main window.
  • Overlay auto-sizes responsively; no longer clips in narrow window configurations.
  • Assign button updated to a + (plus.circle) icon for clarity.
  • Overlay drag and positioning behaviour unified with the Settings sheet.

Macros

  • Macro slot recall now correctly applies all parameter updates through the canonical pipeline on every click — no more silent misfires.
  • Lock Slots Control Mode is now scoped per macro identity instead of globally, preventing cross-macro interference.
  • Macro activity LED now fires during slider drag, not on release.
  • Macro persistence decoupled from theme saves — macros survive theme switches without writing to the theme file.
  • Macro persistence reliability and startup restore hardened.
  • Orphaned macro routes (from deleted groups or operators) cleaned up automatically on load.

Editor

  • Track palette traversal, group removal, and parameter selection logic corrected.
  • Recursive parameter group movement enabled; Remove from Group context menu item added to reassign parameters back to the All Parameters pool.
  • Drag-to-reorder colour operators in the Editor parameter list.
  • Shift-select and right-click selection in the Editor parameter list fixed.
  • Dragged operator row selection background cleared for legibility.
  • Group search: pressing Enter now confirms and navigates instead of toggling expand.

CFG & Grade

  • CFG clip sort order layout fixed; header arrow keys now theme-driven.
  • GLOBAL directive radio dot uses correct orange accent; label stays teal.
  • CFG header button XML keys unified into Button* naming.
  • Grade EDIT button active state (gold border, warm light icon) now reads correctly from XML.
  • Grading theme ownership correctly falls back to DMTheme-first.

Theme Library

  • 1px separator added above the versions header for visual clarity.
  • Factory Default theme no longer cross-contaminates edit history.
  • Factory themes protected from save-back corruption.

Bug Fixes

  • Support email address updated.
  • Missing XML colour keys AutoSetupHeaderAction* and MacroSlotListAccentText restored.
  • Disabled button text opacity raised for legibility.

New XML Theme Keys

  • MacroSlotListAccentText, AutoSetupHeaderAction*, MacroASHeaderButton*, CfgHeaderButton*, CfgMenuActiveText, TracksTTMCfgRadioActive.

item.title: Version 1.6.5
item.description:
AutoSetup

  • AutoSetup now presents as a native macOS sheet, matching the Settings overlay — drag it freely, detached from the main window.
  • Overlay auto-sizes responsively; no longer clips in narrow window configurations.
  • Assign button updated to a + (plus.circle) icon for clarity.
  • Overlay drag and positioning behaviour unified with the Settings sheet.

Macros

  • Macro slot recall now correctly applies all parameter updates through the canonical pipeline on every click — no more silent misfires.
  • Lock Slots Control Mode is now scoped per macro identity instead of globally, preventing cross-macro interference.
  • Macro activity LED now fires during slider drag, not on release.
  • Macro persistence decoupled from theme saves — macros survive theme switches without writing to the theme file.
  • Macro persistence reliability and startup restore hardened.
  • Orphaned macro routes (from deleted groups or operators) cleaned up automatically on load.

Editor

  • Track palette traversal, group removal, and parameter selection logic corrected.
  • Recursive parameter group movement enabled; Remove from Group context menu item added to reassign parameters back to the All Parameters pool.
  • Drag-to-reorder colour operators in the Editor parameter list.
  • Shift-select and right-click selection in the Editor parameter list fixed.
  • Dragged operator row selection background cleared for legibility.
  • Group search: pressing Enter now confirms and navigates instead of toggling expand.

CFG & Grade

  • CFG clip sort order layout fixed; header arrow keys now theme-driven.
  • GLOBAL directive radio dot uses correct orange accent; label stays teal.
  • CFG header button XML keys unified into Button* naming.
  • Grade EDIT button active state (gold border, warm light icon) now reads correctly from XML.
  • Grading theme ownership correctly falls back to DMTheme-first.

Theme Library

  • 1px separator added above the versions header for visual clarity.
  • Factory Default theme no longer cross-contaminates edit history.
  • Factory themes protected from save-back corruption.

Bug Fixes

  • Support email address updated.
  • Missing XML colour keys AutoSetupHeaderAction* and MacroSlotListAccentText restored.
  • Disabled button text opacity raised for legibility.

New XML Theme Keys

  • MacroSlotListAccentText, AutoSetupHeaderAction*, MacroASHeaderButton*, CfgHeaderButton*, CfgMenuActiveText, TracksTTMCfgRadioActive.

item.title: Version 1.6.5
item.description:
AutoSetup

  • AutoSetup now presents as a native macOS sheet, matching the Settings overlay — drag it freely, detached from the main window.
  • Overlay auto-sizes responsively; no longer clips in narrow window configurations.
  • Assign button updated to a + (plus.circle) icon for clarity.
  • Overlay drag and positioning behaviour unified with the Settings sheet.

Macros

  • Macro slot recall now correctly applies all parameter updates through the canonical pipeline on every click — no more silent misfires.
  • Lock Slots Control Mode is now scoped per macro identity instead of globally, preventing cross-macro interference.
  • Macro activity LED now fires during slider drag, not on release.
  • Macro persistence decoupled from theme saves — macros survive theme switches without writing to the theme file.
  • Macro persistence reliability and startup restore hardened.
  • Orphaned macro routes (from deleted groups or operators) cleaned up automatically on load.

Editor

  • Track palette traversal, group removal, and parameter selection logic corrected.
  • Recursive parameter group movement enabled; Remove from Group context menu item added to reassign parameters back to the All Parameters pool.
  • Drag-to-reorder colour operators in the Editor parameter list.
  • Shift-select and right-click selection in the Editor parameter list fixed.
  • Dragged operator row selection background cleared for legibility.
  • Group search: pressing Enter now confirms and navigates instead of toggling expand.

CFG & Grade

  • CFG clip sort order layout fixed; header arrow keys now theme-driven.
  • GLOBAL directive radio dot uses correct orange accent; label stays teal.
  • CFG header button XML keys unified into Button* naming.
  • Grade EDIT button active state (gold border, warm light icon) now reads correctly from XML.
  • Grading theme ownership correctly falls back to DMTheme-first.

Theme Library

  • 1px separator added above the versions header for visual clarity.
  • Factory Default theme no longer cross-contaminates edit history.
  • Factory themes protected from save-back corruption.

Bug Fixes

  • Support email address updated.
  • Missing XML colour keys AutoSetupHeaderAction* and MacroSlotListAccentText restored.
  • Disabled button text opacity raised for legibility.

New XML Theme Keys

  • MacroSlotListAccentText, AutoSetupHeaderAction*, MacroASHeaderButton*, CfgHeaderButton*, CfgMenuActiveText, TracksTTMCfgRadioActive.

item.title: Version 1.6.4
item.description:
AutoSetup

  • AutoSetup now presents as a native macOS sheet, matching the Settings overlay — drag it freely, detached from the main window.
  • Overlay auto-sizes responsively; no longer clips in narrow window configurations.
  • Assign button updated to a + (plus.circle) icon for clarity.
  • Overlay drag and positioning behaviour unified with the Settings sheet.

Macros

  • Macro slot recall now correctly applies all parameter updates through the canonical pipeline on every click — no more silent misfires.
  • Lock Slots Control Mode is now scoped per macro identity instead of globally, preventing cross-macro interference.
  • Macro activity LED now fires during slider drag, not on release.
  • Macro persistence decoupled from theme saves — macros survive theme switches without writing to the theme file.
  • Macro persistence reliability and startup restore hardened.
  • Orphaned macro routes (from deleted groups or operators) cleaned up automatically on load, and now immediately upon deletion or baking.

Editor

  • Track palette traversal, group removal, and parameter selection logic corrected.
  • Recursive parameter group movement enabled; Remove from Group context menu item added to reassign parameters back to the All Parameters pool.
  • Drag-to-reorder colour operators in the Editor parameter list.
  • Shift-select and right-click selection in the Editor parameter list fixed.
  • Dragged operator row selection background cleared for legibility.
  • Group search: pressing Enter now confirms and navigates instead of toggling expand.
  • Interactive Guide header height layout adjusted for improved visual spacing.
  • Tracks palette selector arm initialization logic corrected to reliably select the first available active swatch using strict column-major traversal.

CFG & Grade

  • CFG clip sort order layout fixed; header arrow keys now theme-driven.
  • GLOBAL directive radio dot uses correct orange accent; label stays teal.
  • CFG header button XML keys unified into Button* naming.
  • Grade EDIT button active state (gold border, warm light icon) now reads correctly from XML.
  • Grading theme ownership correctly falls back to DMTheme-first.

Theme Library

  • 1px separator added above the versions header for visual clarity.
  • Factory Default theme no longer cross-contaminates edit history.
  • Factory themes protected from save-back corruption.
  • Removed a stray duplicate "Gain Reduction Meter" group, with an automatic runtime migration to clean this up for existing users.

Bug Fixes

  • Support email address updated.
  • Missing XML colour keys AutoSetupHeaderAction* and MacroSlotListAccentText restored.
  • Disabled button text opacity raised for legibility.

New XML Theme Keys

  • MacroSlotListAccentText, AutoSetupHeaderAction*, MacroASHeaderButton*, CfgHeaderButton*, CfgMenuActiveText, TracksTTMCfgRadioActive, MacroToolbarActiveButtonBackground, MacroToolbarActiveButtonBorder, MacroToolbarActiveButtonText, MacroTitleTrashConfirm.

item.title: Version 1.6.4
item.description:
AutoSetup

  • AutoSetup now presents as a native macOS sheet, matching the Settings overlay — drag it freely, resize independently of the main window.
  • AutoSetup overlay now auto-sizes responsively; no longer clips in narrow window configurations.
  • Assign button updated to a + icon (plus.circle) for clarity.
  • Overlay drag and positioning behaviour unified with the Settings sheet.

Macros

  • Macro slot recall now correctly applies all parameter updates through the canonical pipeline on every click — no more silent misfires.
  • Lock Slots Control Mode is now scoped per macro identity instead of globally, preventing cross-macro interference.
  • Macro activity LED now fires during slider drag, not on release.

Editor

  • Track palette traversal, group removal, and parameter selection logic corrected.
  • Recursive parameter group movement enabled; Remove from Group context menu item added to reassign parameters back to the All Parameters pool.
  • Drag-to-reorder colour operators in the Editor parameter list.
  • Shift-select and right-click selection in the Editor parameter list fixed.
  • Dragged operator row selection background cleared for legibility.
  • Group search: pressing Enter now confirms and navigates instead of toggling expand.

CFG & Grade

  • CFG clip sort order layout fixed; header arrow keys now theme-driven.
  • GLOBAL directive radio dot uses correct orange accent; label stays teal.
  • CFG header button XML keys unified into Button* naming.
  • Grade EDIT button active state (gold border, warm light icon) now reads correctly from XML.
  • Grading theme ownership correctly falls back to DMTheme-first.

Theme Library

  • 1px separator added above the versions header for visual clarity.
  • Factory Default theme no longer cross-contaminates edit history.
  • Factory themes protected from save-back corruption.

Bug Fixes

  • Support email address updated.
  • Macro persistence decoupled from theme saves — macros survive theme switches without writing to the theme file.
  • Macro persistence reliability and startup restore hardened.
  • Orphaned macro routes (from deleted groups or operators) cleaned up automatically on load.
  • Missing XML colour keys AutoSetupHeaderAction* and MacroSlotListAccentText restored.
  • Disabled button text opacity raised for legibility.

New XML Theme Keys

  • MacroSlotListAccentText, AutoSetupHeaderAction*, MacroASHeaderButton*, CfgHeaderButton*, CfgMenuActiveText, TracksTTMCfgRadioActive.

item.title: Version 1.6.3
item.description:
Macros

Attach a single slider to multiple colour operators across multiple groups. Each route has independent input/output ranges, inversion, and a non-linear expression curve (10 types). Save named memory slots and recall any state instantly.

  • Map any operator — including all Grade parameters — to a macro via right-click in the editor.
  • Expression curves: Linear, Exponential, Logarithmic, Sigmoid, Gaussian Bell, Stepped, Threshold, Ease In, Ease Out, Ease In/Out.
  • Up to 5 memory slots per macro (7 for the Master Grade macro in Lock Slots mode).
  • Slot rows are clickable for instant recall. Grade Memory binding supported.
  • Omni mode: routes all operators on the current group regardless of assignment.
  • Solo: pin one macro per step, mute all others.
  • ARM NEUTRAL: slider is gated until it crosses the stored neutral position.
  • Per-theme persistence in Application Support; decoupled from theme saves.

AutoSetup

Guided overlay that walks you through theme groups one at a time, cycling group presets and firing macro snapshots without using the editor directly.

  • Three traversal modes: Simple (top-level groups), Detailed (all depths), Z-Depth (experimental depth grouping).
  • Editor scrolls to, selects, and auto-expands the current group; non-active leaf groups collapse.
  • Assign mode: bind groups to macro steps directly from the AutoSetup navigator.
  • Slots view shows named memory slots for the current step; tap to recall.
  • Return arrow navigates back after a Lock Slot jump.
  • All header and icon colors driven by XML theme keys.

Other Changes

  • CFG overlay: unified header button color keys, corrected radio dot/label coloring, CYCLES sort mode layout fix.
  • Grade EDIT button active state now reads correctly from XML (gold border, warm light icon).
  • Orphaned macro routes (from deleted groups/operators) are cleaned up automatically.
  • New XML keys: MacroSlotListAccentText, AutoSetupHeaderAction*, MacroASHeaderButton*, CfgHeaderButton*.
